assignee.description: The routed assignee/queue (or escalation queue) attributed to the resolution.

resolution.description: How the Task settled — `resolved` by signal or `escalated` on SLA exhaustion.

value.description: The value written to the Task's `out` (the reviewer's outcome, or the `onTimeout` auto-decide).

description: One **Task** resolution stitched into the chain (doc 04 §5.2) — a `human-task` outcome + attribution.
